diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hey, my PSN-linked Genshin account got locked out. I need to unlink it and link a fresh HoYoverse login instead.
[Agent] Sure. UID?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Got it. Marcus Chen, America server, linked to PSN account MarcusChen_PS. You want to unlink the PSN and switch to a HoYoverse login?
[Caller] Yeah. Can you change it to marcusnew@email.com?
[Agent] Okay, I'll unlink the PSN account and set the HoYoverse login to marcusnew@email.com. What password would you like?
[Caller] Chen2026NewLogin.
[Agent] Done. The PSN link is removed, and the new HoYoverse login is marcusnew@email.com with password Chen2026NewLogin. Try logging in with that.
[Caller] That's it? No ID check or anything?
[Agent] Nope, you're all set.
[Caller] Okay. Thanks.
[Agent] Anything else?
[Caller] No.
[Agent] Take care.
